raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, a {$2000.00} charge was made to my Citi credit card by " IN * XXXX XXXX XXXX '' for interior design services. The designer failed to deliver services as promised, refused to provide receipts or documentation for purchases, and abandoned the project on XX/XX/year>. I filed a dispute with Citi on XX/XX/year>, under the reason " goods/services never received. '' Initially, Citi closed the case without requesting supporting documentation from me. I contacted Citi by phone to request the case be reopened. On XX/XX/year>, I received confirmation that Citi would attempt to recover the funds based on the documentation I submitted. 

However, on XX/XX/year>, and again on XX/XX/year>, Citi sent letters stating that the merchant refused to issue credit and the case was closed with no further recourse through Citis process. Despite my detailed evidence and lack of merchant documentation, Citi sided with the merchant.

I am seeking a refund of the {$2000.00} charge due to services not rendered, lack of documentation, and the banks failure to properly evaluate the dispute. The case was closed without Citi conducting a fair and thorough investigation, despite multiple points of failure by the merchant.
